hero.subtitle: DREAM ON THE ROAD · 为梦出发
hero.title: 半挂车研发制造专家
hero.description: T700C高强度钢材 · 全系定制化生产 · 品质铸就未来
hero.description_en: T700C High-Strength Steel · Fully Customized Production · Quality Builds the Future

about.title: 关于欧阳聚德
about.subtitle: 做客户值得信任、员工值得自豪的企业
about.subtitle_en: A Company Trusted by Customers, Proud for Employees
about.para1: 湖北欧阳聚德汽车有限公司位于湖北省枣阳市，专业从事半挂车的研发、生产与销售。公司拥有现代化生产车间，配备完整的专业化生产流水线，产品服务全国各地货运物流、工程建设等行业客户。
about.para1_en: Hubei Ouyang Jude Automobile Co., Ltd., located in Zaoyang, Hubei Province, specializes in the R&D, manufacturing and sales of semi-trailers. Equipped with modern workshops and professional production lines, our products serve freight logistics and construction industries nationwide.
about.para2: 公司采用T700C超高强度钢材，配合先进焊接工艺，实现整车轻量化与高强度的完美结合。坚持品质铸就未来的发展理念，以技术创新为驱动，持续提升产品质量和服务水平。
about.para2_en: Using T700C ultra-high-strength steel with advanced welding technology, we achieve the perfect balance of lightweight design and high strength. Committed to quality-driven development, we continuously improve product quality and service through technological innovation.

about_page.ab-hero-eyebrow: 关于我们 · 企业概况
about_page.ab-hero-title_en: Built on Trust, Driven by Quality
about_page.ab-hero-tagline: 做客户值得信任、员工值得自豪的企业
about_page.ab-hero-tagline_en: A Company Trusted by Customers, Proud for Employees
about_page.ab-mission-headline: 扎根千古帝乡湖北枣阳 · 6 大系列覆盖主流车型 · T700C 高强钢 · 全国 30+ 省服务网络
about_page.ab-mission-headline_en: Founded 2017 in Zaoyang · 6 Series Covering All Major Trailers · T700C High-Strength Steel · 30+ Provinces Served
about_page.ab-give-back-1-body: 持续向枣阳本地及周边县乡的助学、救灾与敬老项目捐赠——做的是常态投入,不是一次性运动。
about_page.ab-give-back-1-body_en: Sustained donations to local education, disaster relief, and elderly care programs in Zaoyang and surrounding counties — quietly recurring, not one-off campaigns.
about_page.ab-give-back-2-body: 公司设有活跃的党建组织,党员志愿者队伍常年参与社区服务——从义务献血到防汛救灾应急响应。
about_page.ab-give-back-2-body_en: Active Party-building organization within the company. Party-member volunteer team participates in community service throughout the year — from blood drives to flood emergency response.
about_page.ab-give-back-3-body: 为枣阳本地提供 200+ 工作岗位,长期采购周边钢材、配件、物流——每一台车出厂,都拉动一条上游生计。
about_page.ab-give-back-3-body_en: 200+ local jobs in Zaoyang. Working with regional steel, parts, and logistics suppliers — every trailer that rolls out the gate carries dozens of upstream livelihoods with it.
about_page.ab-cta-slogan: 聚德同行 · 逐梦前行
about_page.ab-cta-desc: 从规格表到交付,每一步都有真人对接
about_page.ab-cta-desc_en: From spec sheet to delivery — every step you'll have a real person to talk to
about_page.ab-cta-tagline_en: Jude World — Bringing Together People of Virtue
about_page.ab-timeline-desc: 一台车、一个客户、一个里程碑,我们走到今天
about_page.ab-timeline-desc_en: Built one trailer, one customer, one milestone at a time
about_page.ab-tech-desc: 每年 300 万元研发投入,两个技术部门,三所合作院校,一个目标:把研究转化为可靠性。
about_page.ab-tech-desc_en: 3M+ RMB invested in R&D each year. Two technical departments. Three university partners. One target: turning research into reliability.
about_page.ab-adv-desc: 回购、转介、提车速度——客户用脚投票的三件事
about_page.ab-adv-desc_en: Repeat orders, referrals, and the speed at which a custom trailer becomes yours
about_page.ab-tech-card-1-body: 累计开展合作研发 32 项 · 科技成果转化 17 项
about_page.ab-tech-card-2-title: 两个研发部门 · 22 名工程师
about_page.ab-tech-card-2-body: "车辆技术研发中心" + "焊工技能大师"工作室
about_page.ab-tech-card-2-body_en: Vehicle Tech R&D Center + Master Welder Studio
about_page.ab-tech-card-3-body: 自主研发,全国首创。配合自研等离子切割装置,减少 37% 设备投入、提升 20% 整体工效。
about_page.ab-tech-card-3-body_en: The first knuckle-boom truck-mounted crane semi-trailer of its kind nationwide — designed and manufactured entirely in-house. Combined with our self-developed plasma cutting equipment, we cut 37% of equipment investment and lifted 20% of production efficiency.
about_page.ab-tech-card-4-title: 独立实验室 · 现代化设备
about_page.ab-tech-card-4-body: 每年研发投入 300 万元+
about_page.ab-tech-card-4-body_en: 3M+ RMB invested in R&D each year
about_page.ab-adv-card-1-eyebrow: 客户回购 · 口碑转介
about_page.ab-adv-card-1-title_en: Customers Come Back, and Bring Friends
about_page.ab-adv-card-1-body: 在切换成本极低的挂车市场,我们的客户会回来,还会带朋友来。这是产品交付之后是否经得起跑的最干净的信号。
about_page.ab-adv-card-1-body_en: In a market where switching cost is low, our customers come back to us, and bring others. That's the cleanest signal that what we sell holds up after delivery.
about_page.ab-adv-card-2-eyebrow: 交付节奏 · 提车速度
about_page.ab-adv-card-2-title_en: From Spec Sheet to Driving Off
about_page.ab-adv-card-2-body: 最高日产能 15 台、年产能 8,000 台——生产周期围着客户提车节奏排,不是反过来。需要尽快上路时,我们知道怎么帮你做到。
about_page.ab-adv-card-2-body_en: Daily peak output of 15 units, 8,000-unit annual capacity — production scheduling is built around customer pickup, not the other way around. When you need it on the road, we know how to make that happen.
about_page.ab-adv-card-3-title_en: Built for Your Cargo, Your Route
about_page.ab-adv-card-3-body: 不同的货、不同的路、不同的司机——每一台车都从"你实际拉什么"开始。6 大产品系列,每一系列内部深度可定制,不让你将就标准件。
about_page.ab-adv-card-3-body_en: Different cargo, different roads, different drivers — every trailer we build starts with what you actually carry. Six product lines, deep customization within each, no off-shelf compromise.

timeline_items.title: 公司成立 · 陕汽重卡优秀经销商
timeline_items.body: 在湖北襄阳枣阳成立,主营半挂车研发制造与销售。同年成为陕汽重卡优秀经销商、襄阳地区一级代理商,启动连续多年的"守合同重信用企业"纪录。
timeline_items.body_en: Founded in Zaoyang, Hubei. In the same year, recognized by Shaanxi Heavy Duty as an authorized dealer and 'Hubei Regional Market Breakthrough' awardee — becoming the first-tier dealer in Xiangyang region.

timeline_items.title: 工分制九星激励 · 陕汽市场突破奖
timeline_items.title_en: 'Workpoint System' Launched · Shaanxi Market Breakthrough Award
timeline_items.body: 引进《工分制》九星激励管理体系,评级从一星到九星员工,让奋斗者成为受益者;同年获陕汽重卡颁发"湖北区域市场突破奖"。"聚德心"企业文化从这一年起逐步成形。
timeline_items.body_en: Introduced the 'Workpoint System' — a 1-to-9-star employee tier with transparent evaluation. Awarded 'Hubei Regional Market Breakthrough' by Shaanxi Heavy Duty. The 'Jude Spirit' company culture took shape from this year.

timeline_items.title: 襄阳市物流协会副会长 · 卡车之家年度数字营销创新奖
timeline_items.title_en: Xiangyang Logistics Vice-Chair · Truck-Home Digital Marketing Award
timeline_items.body: 当选襄阳市物流协会副会长,行业话语权确立;荣获卡车之家"年度最佳数字营销创新奖"——首个全国性品牌认可。
timeline_items.body_en: Elected Vice-Chairman of Xiangyang Logistics Industry Association. Won 'Annual Best Digital Marketing Innovation' from Truck-Home, our first national-level brand recognition.

timeline_items.title: 国家级重点装备项目 · 产能突破
timeline_items.title_en: National Key Equipment Projects · Production Breakthrough
timeline_items.body: 成立专项研发小组,承担国家级重点装备项目,取得相应承制资质与质量体系认证。年销量突破 1,996 台,年产量突破 1,919 台;同年获世界制造厂识别代号(WMI)证书。
timeline_items.body_en: Established the dedicated R&D group for national-level key equipment projects. Annual sales exceeded 1,996 units; annual production exceeded 1,919 units. Obtained the World Manufacturer Identifier (WMI) certificate.

timeline_items.title: 高新技术企业 · 瞪羚企业 · 湖北工大产学研基地
timeline_items.title_en: High-Tech Enterprise · Gazelle · Hubei University R&D Base
timeline_items.body: 三连跳的一年:高新技术企业证书取得、2021 年瞪羚企业(高成长性科技企业)入选、湖北工业大学产学研合作基地正式签约。同年获评"先进基层党组织"+ 全市物流行业星级诚信企业 + 物流产业链先进单位。
timeline_items.body_en: A breakthrough year of three national/provincial recognitions: Certified High-Tech Enterprise, named '2021 Gazelle Enterprise', and signed the joint R&D base with Hubei University of Technology.

timeline_items.title: 湖北省专精特新"小巨人"企业
timeline_items.body: 荣获湖北省专精特新"小巨人"企业(湖北省经信厅);入选湖北省信息化和工业化融合试点示范企业;枣阳市校企产学合作促进会工作站设立。
timeline_items.body_en: Recognized by Hubei Province as a 'Specialized, Refined, Differentiated, Innovative (SRDI) Little Giant' enterprise. Selected into the Hubei IT-Industrialization Integration Pilot.

timeline_items.title: 三项官方认证年
timeline_items.body: 三项政府认证一齐落地:纳税突出贡献企业(枣阳市委)+ 年度安全生产工作突出单位(枣阳市人民政府)+ 襄阳市物流装备服务先进单位(襄阳市物流行业协会)。
timeline_items.body_en: Three official designations: 'Outstanding Tax Contribution', 'Annual Safety-Production Outstanding Unit', and 'Xiangyang Logistics Equipment Service Advanced Unit'.

timeline_items.title: 湖北省级智能制造试点示范企业 · AAA 守合同重信用
timeline_items.title_en: Provincial Smart Manufacturing Pilot · AAA Credit Enterprise
timeline_items.body: 省经信厅授予湖北省智能制造试点示范企业;市场监督局评定守合同重信用企业(AAA);加入枣阳市汽车及零配件产业知识产权联盟。
timeline_items.body_en: Awarded 'Provincial Smart Manufacturing Pilot Enterprise'. Recognized as 'AAA Contract-and-Credit-Honoring Enterprise'. Joined the Zaoyang Automotive & Parts Industry IP Alliance.

timeline_items.title: 省级绿色工厂 · 特型物流车智能工厂 · 数字化二级转型
timeline_items.title_en: Green Factory · Specialty Smart Factory · Digital Transformation Tier-2
timeline_items.body: 省经信厅三项一齐:湖北省绿色工厂(能效+清洁生产)+ 特型物流车制造智能工厂(产线智能化落地)+ 省级数字化二级转型。
timeline_items.body_en: Three provincial designations from Hubei Dept. of Economy & IT: 'Provincial Green Factory', 'Specialty Logistics Vehicle Smart Manufacturing Factory', and 'Provincial Digital Transformation Tier-2'.

timeline_items.title: 湖北省中小企业技术中心 · 世界制造厂代号 3416a · 新官网上线
timeline_items.title_en: Provincial SME Tech Center · World Manufacturer Code 3416a · New Website Online
timeline_items.body: 省经信厅授予湖北省中小企业技术中心;取得世界制造厂代号 3416a(出口车辆全球唯一工业标识);新官网上线——在线选配器 + 询价直推钉钉销售群。
timeline_items.body_en: Recognized as 'Hubei Provincial SME Technology Center'. Awarded World Manufacturer Code 3416a. New website online: configurator + real-time DingTalk inquiry pipeline.

news_page.news-hero-tagline: 公司动态 · 党政动态 · 客户案例 — 实时同步公众号最新资讯
news_page.news-hero-tagline_en: Company news, Party-building updates, and customer stories — synced from our WeChat Official Account.
